Lauren Goss-Miller

About

The person
behind the pitch

LaurenGoss-Miller

I am a PR and marketing professional with 15+ years' experience delivering integrated campaigns, strategic activations, social media content and high-impact partnerships across premium wine, fashion and lifestyle brands.

As a former small business owner, I understand what it takes to build a brand from the ground up — not just from the agency side, but from lived experience. I combine strong commercial insight, project leadership and creative execution, making me a versatile, results-focused consultant ready to support ambitious brands and drive genuine growth.

Expertise

Integrated campaign strategy & end-to-end delivery
National editorial & media placement
Creative direction & stakeholder alignment
SEO, SEM & analytics-led measurement
Small business & e-commerce growth strategy

Services

What Gossip
can do for you

Every brand has a story worth telling. Gossip PR delivers bespoke, end-to-end communications and digital marketing support — designed around your goals, your audience, and the impression you want to make.

01
PR & Media Relations
Strategic media pitching, press release writing and ongoing journalist relationship management to place your brand in the publications that matter. From national editorial to niche lifestyle titles — I secure coverage that builds credibility and drives awareness.
Press ReleasesMedia PitchingEditorial PlacementMedia Monitoring
→
02
Social Media Management
Platform-tailored content strategies, aesthetic direction, editorial calendars and community management across Instagram, TikTok, Pinterest and beyond. I build engaged audiences that convert — anchored in analytics and driven by a clear brand voice.
StrategyEditorial CalendarsCommunity ManagementMeta Suite
→
03
Influencer Marketing
Curated influencer identification, outreach, campaign management and results reporting. I align your brand with the right creators — micro to macro — delivering authentic partnerships that genuinely resonate with your target audience.
Creator IDCampaign ManagementProduct SeedingReporting
→
04
Brand Strategy
Brand audits, competitor analysis, messaging architecture and positioning frameworks that ensure every touchpoint tells a cohesive story. Whether launching, repositioning or scaling — I build the strategic foundation that holds everything together.
Brand AuditPositioningMessaging FrameworkLaunch Strategy
→
05
Content Creation
Compelling written and visual content — from campaign copy and social captions to newsletters and blog articles. Produced with brand consistency in mind and optimised for SEO and engagement across every digital channel.
CopywritingNewslettersSEO ContentCanva / DesignKlaviyo
→
06
E-Commerce & Digital Growth
Drawing on my own experience building and scaling an e-commerce brand, I help businesses optimise their digital presence — from Shopify setup and email marketing via Klaviyo through to paid social strategy and conversion-led content.
ShopifyKlaviyoEmail MarketingPaid SocialAnalytics

How I Work

A considered approach

01
Discovery & Brand Immersion
A thorough brand audit, stakeholder interviews and competitive landscape review allow me to understand where you are and where you want to go before I ever pitch a single idea.
02
Strategy & Roadmap
A bespoke PR and digital strategy with clear objectives, target media channels, audience personas and a phased roadmap with measurable milestones tailored to your brand.
03
Execution & Creative
Pitching journalists, producing content, managing influencer relationships and running campaigns with relentless attention to brand alignment and quality.
04
Reporting & Refinement
Transparent monthly reporting on placements, reach, engagement and ROI. I review, learn and refine continuously — always optimising toward what works.

"Every brand deserves to be talked about — let's make sure yours is."
